title: Spicy Chewy Middle Eastern Vegan Chickpea Flatbread
description: This crowd-pleasing flatbread is a spicy twist on traditional recipes, incorporating grape juice for added flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup roasted red peppers, finely chopped

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine cooked chickpeas, roasted red peppers, chopped parsley, mint leaves, minced garlic, grape juice, olive oil, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed and the mixture is slightly thickened. Let it rest for 10 minutes.
Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Pour the mixture into a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or silicone mat.
Spread the mixture evenly in a thin layer, creating small indentations for added texture and flavor. Bake for about 20-25 minutes until golden brown on top.
Serve warm as a snack or side dish with hummus.
